languages.text: "Я, Вольный Торговец фон Валанциус, заберу их на свой корабль. Они помогли отбить атаку Декабалуса".

traits.locale_text: ну я тебя с пацанами могу вытащить

languages.text: "I, Rogue Trader von Valancius, will take them back to my ship. They helped to fend off Decabalus's attack."
languages.original_text: "Я, Вольный Торговец фон Валанциус, заберу их на свой корабль. Они помогли отбить атаку Декабалуса".

traits.locale_text: "I, Rogue Trader von Valancius, will take them back to my ship. They helped to fend off Decabalus's attack."

"I, Rogue Trader von Valancius, will take them back to my ship. They helped to fend off Decabalus's attack."

languages.text: 「私は、ローグトレーダーフォン・ヴァランシウス。彼らを私の船に連れ帰る。彼らはデカバラスの攻撃を撃退するのに役立った」
languages.original_text: "I, Rogue Trader von Valancius, will take them back to my ship. They helped to fend off Decabalus's attack."

traits.locale_text: 「私は、ローグトレーダーのバルアンシウス。彼らを私の船に連れ帰ります。彼らはデカバラスの攻撃を撃退するのに役立ちました。」

languages.text: «Yo, como Comerciante Independiente von Valancius, los llevaré a mi nave. Ayudaron a rechazar el ataque de Decabalus».
languages.original_text: "I, Rogue Trader von Valancius, will take them back to my ship. They helped to fend off Decabalus's attack."

traits.locale_text: «Yo, como Comerciante Independiente von Valancius, los llevaré a mi nave. Ayudaron a rechazar el ataque de Decabalus».

languages.text: “我，行商浪人冯·瓦兰修斯，要把他们带回我的船上。他们协助抵御了德卡巴洛斯的袭击。”
languages.original_text: "I, Rogue Trader von Valancius, will take them back to my ship. They helped to fend off Decabalus's attack."

traits.locale_text: “我，行商浪人冯·瓦兰修斯，要把他们带回我的船上。他们协助抵御了德卡巴洛斯的袭击。”

languages.text: Ich, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin} von Valancius, werde sie auf mein Schiff bringen. Sie haben geholfen, Decabalus' Angriff abzuwehren."
languages.original_text: "I, Rogue Trader von Valancius, will take them back to my ship. They helped to fend off Decabalus's attack."

traits.locale_text: Ich, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin} von Valancius, werde sie auf mein Schiff bringen. Sie haben geholfen, Decabalus' Angriff abzuwehren."

languages.text: "Hür Tacir von Valancius olarak onları gemime geri götüreceğim. Decabalus'un saldırısını savuşturmaya yardım ettiler."
languages.original_text: "I, Rogue Trader von Valancius, will take them back to my ship. They helped to fend off Decabalus's attack."

traits.locale_text: "Hür Tacir von Valancius olarak onları gemime geri götüreceğim. Decabalus'un saldırısını savuşturmaya yardım ettiler."

languages.text: « Je suis {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} von Valancius, et je compte bien les ramener à mon vaisseau. Ils nous ont aidés à repousser l'attaque de Décabalus. »
